positive: A stylized, graphic representation of a cosmic forest at twilight. The scene features massive, bioluminescent trees with ethereal, glowing foliage in deep sapphire and emerald tones. The ground is covered in abstract geometric patterns resembling crystals and nebula clouds. A majestic, crescent moon dominates the upper third, casting strong, dramatic shadows. The overall aesthetic is modern mystic, highly contrasted, and suitable for screen printing on fabric. Central composition, minimalist yet highly detailed, rendered in a bold vector illustration style with elements of Art Nouveau geometry and Japanese woodblock woodcut etching, high contrast, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, faded, monochrome, realistic photo, photography
